title: AutoVote
description: An mod that autovotes designed for cubecraft
body:
##  🔹 AutoVote Mod (Fabric 1.21+ Only) 🔹

AutoVote is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod designed specifically for CubeCraft players. It automatically handles voting in CubeCraft mini-games, saving you time and ensuring your preferred options are always selected without any manual input.

 Whether you're jumping into EggWars, SkyWars, or other CubeCraft game modes, AutoVote will handle the voting process for you – instantly and reliably.

## Features:
 

- Automatically votes for your pre-selected options in supported CubeCraft games
  
- Designed to work seamlessly with CubeCraft's server mechanics
  
- Simple, clean, and fast
  
- Keybinds: Press a key to open the mod’s configuration menu (customizable in the Controls settings default key = ` )

### Requirements:


[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)


### Youtube Video

[Youtube Link](https://youtu.be/pDPkFcdnzp4)
